title: Module 1
content:
Primary Processes: Casting- Characteristics of sand, patterns, cores,
chaplets, riser, chills, Defects in castings. Forming- Forging - Extrusion-
wire drawing process – Rolling. Selection of primary forming process.
Defects in forging and rolling.

title: Module 2
content:
Joining processes–Welding: Classification, Gas welding: Oxyacetylene
welding- types of flame.– Arc Welding: shielded metal arc welding,
TIG, MIG, submerged arc welding, ultrasonic welding, thermit welding,
friction welding, resistance spot welding, resistance seam welding.
Brazing, Soldering, types of solders and fluxes- Adhesive bonding.
Selection of
joining process for various applications.

title: Module 3
content:
Machining– orthogonal and oblique cutting, rake and clearance angle,
Types of chip, Tool life – Taylor’s tool life equation, Machinability. Lathe
– types of operations, tool holders, inserts, work holding devices. Milling –
types of operations, types of milling machines, milling cutters, simple
indexing.
Drilling. Introduction to Shaping, Plaining and Slotting machines. Grinding
– types of operations. NC and CNC machines, micromachining.

title: Module 4
content:
Non-conventional processes – EDM, ECM, USM, EBM, LBM, WJM,
AWJM, PCM, process capabilities, applications.
Additive manufacturing, Rapid prototyping, stereo-lithography, LIGA
process.
